description: This Dart source file defines a Flutter widget for the admin home screen of an app that manages tales. It includes UI code for displaying, adding, editing, and deleting tales, as well as state management interactions with an AdminController.

classes.name: AdminHomeScreen
classes.description: A StatefulWidget representing the main admin panel screen where tales can be viewed, added, or edited.

classes.name: _AdminTaleTile
classes.description: A StatelessWidget that displays individual tale details with options to edit or delete.

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes the widget state and triggers loading of the tales after the first frame.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the admin home screen, including UI elements like app bar, list of tales, and floating action button.
